A Category 6 Ethernet patch cable is also referred to as a Cat6 network cable, Cat6 cable, Cat6 Ethernet cable, or Cat 6 data/LAN cable. A wired Cat 6 data cable is more reliable and secure than a wireless network or Cat5 cable network for your internet connections.

productName: Canon Color imageCLASS MF665Cdw
productDescription: Color imageCLASS MF665Cdw All-in-One, Wireless, Duplex Laser Printer
marketingCopy: Designed for small / home offices and hybrid work environments, the imageCLASS MF665Cdw model balances speedy performance and minimal maintenance. The MF665Cdw is easy to set up and has a customizable, 5" color touchscreen that delivers an intuitive user experience. Produce crisp, colorful documents with fast print speeds of up to 26 pages per minute, using high quality Canon Genuine Toner 075 / 075 H. Use Poster Artist Online to create professional-posters, banners and signage. The MF665Cdw offers a plain paper capacity of up to 250 sheets, 1-sheet multipurpose tray, and 50-sheet automatic document feeder, which scans double-sided documents in one pass. Easily connect wirelessly from computers or mobile devices. Print using a variety of mobile apps, including the Canon PRINT app using your compatible mobile device. The MF665Cdw comes with a 3-year limited warranty and is backed by Canon's Service and Support network.
copy1: All-in-One, wireless, duplex printer with easy to use, customizable, color touch display delivers fast, exceptional color output at 26 pages per minute, offers various mobile solutions for printing on the go and includes a 3 year limited warranty.

The 4Vu Privacy Screen can be easily attached by using the included attachments.  *Antimicrobial protection is limited to the privacy screen itself.

Whether you're conquering the latest games or pursuing creative endeavors, the Titan 18 HX represents the pinnacle of mobile computing excellence, offering superior performance, advanced thermal management, and exceptional durability in one remarkable package.
copy1: Standing proudly as a leader in gaming innovation, the Titan 18 HX AI has reached new heights, pushing the limits of performance with its top-tier, all-encompassing features. Its advanced cooling system delivers unmatched power, ensuring smooth performance even during the most demanding tasks. Encased in a strong yet lightweight magnesium-aluminum alloy chassis, this flagship device blends durability with portability, making it the top choice for gamers and creators aiming for excellence.

productName: LS27FG502ENXZA
productDescription: Odyssey G5 G50F 27" 2K QHD (2560 x 1440) 180Hz Gaming Monitor; AMD FreeSync Compatible; HDR; DisplayPort HDMI; Auto Source Switch+
marketingCopy: Samsung's Odyssey G5 QHD Gaming Monitor delivers brilliant visuals for exhilarating gameplay that’s more immersive than ever before. QHD resolution (2560 x 1440), with more than 1.7 times the pixel density of Full HD, boasts incredibly detailed, pin-sharp images. The fast IPS panel, with its 178º viewing angle, provides an engaging gaming experience by consistently delivering crisp, clear hues from various viewpoints. 180Hz Refresh Rate and 1ms response time (GtG) allow ultimate speed for ultra-smooth gaming precision, while G-Sync compatibility syncs the GPU and panel to reduce choppiness, screen lag, and image tearing. Scenes feel more realistic with HDR10, which provides brighter highlights and nuanced shadows for added depth. Black Equalizer improves visibility in the deepest shadows, while Virtual Aim Point increases the accuracy of the player’s aim when the action peaks. Auto Source Switch+ allows instantaneous switching between connected devices without having to flip through multiple inputs. Maintain winning streaks in total comfort with the height-adjustable Ergonomic Stand that easily pivots, tilts, and swivels for the perfect view.
copy1: Samsung 27"" Odyssey G5 G50F QHD Fast IPS 180Hz Gaming Monitor

productDescription: Tower 300 Tempered Glass microATX Mid-Tower Computer Case - Racing Green
marketingCopy: The Tower 300 Racing Green is the newest addition to our Tower Series and it sure shows, now with a redesigned octagonal prism shape to set itself apart. Looking good is not the only thing the Tower excels at either, it can support up to a 420mm AIO radiator on the right side along with a total of up to eight 120mm or 140mm fans. Want an even more unique look then the Tower 300 Racing Green Chassis Stand Kit is a great addition for horizontal placements. (Stand kit sold separately).

productDescription: The Tower 600 Tempered Glass ATX Mid-Tower Computer Case - Bumblebee
marketingCopy: The Tower 600 is an ATX case with a classic vertical case design and comes in an octagonal prism shape that is compatible with the latest hidden-connector motherboards. It supports up to a 420mm AIO radiator on the right side and a 360mm AIO radiator on the left side, and it can accommodate up to thirteen 120mm fans or nine 140mm fans. With a separately sold Chassis Stand Kit, users can enjoy a unique view with a special horizontal placement.

productDescription: Toughpower GT 850 Watt 80 Plus Gold ATX Fully Modular Power Supply - ATX 3.1 Compatible
marketingCopy: 80 PLUS Gold certified, fully modular PSU, compatible with ATX 3.1 specifications, and equipped with a native 12V-2x6 connector. The fully modular Toughpower GT series is designed to deliver 80 PLUS Gold efficiency and is compatible with ATX 3.1 standards. Its native PCIe 12V-2x6 (12+4 pin) modular interface efficiently powers PCIe 12+4 pin graphics cards. Backed by an extensive 5-year warranty, the Toughpower GT series meets the needs of value-oriented users seeking a new power supply with reliable performance.
copy1: The Toughpower GT Series is built to meet modern power demands, supporting the latest ATX 3.1 standards. Available in 750W and 850W models, it provides 80 PLUS Gold efficiency and includes a native PCIe Gen 5.1 12 4 pin connector for high-performance GPUs. With Smart Zero Fan technology and a 120mm hydraulic bearing fan, it ensures quiet operation and reliable power delivery. Backed by a 5-year warranty, it offers stable, efficient performance for demanding users.

productName: Cooler Master Hyper 212 Pro CPU Air Cooler, SickleFlow Edge 120 PWM Fan, Superconductive Composite 4 Copper Heat Pipes, 152mm Tall, Sleek Top Cover, AMD Ryzen AM5/AM4, Intel LGA 1851/1700 Brackets
suggestedWebcategory:
Computer Parts
Air & Water Cooling
Case Fans & Coolers
copy1: Cooler Master brings back its legendary HYPER 212 series with the HYPER 212 PRO, a refined update on the classic design featuring in-house engineered heat pipes. Maintaining the series' signature cooling performance, this model introduces key upgrades: an asymmetrical heat pipe layout enhances RAM clearance, ensuring compatibility across more builds. The redesigned top cover showcases Cooler Masters signature look, while SickleFlow Edge 120 fans provide efficient cooling with striking ARGB lighting. All housed in a sleek black finish, the HYPER 212 PRO offers high-performance cooling at an accessible price point.  Features: Cool for R9 /U7/ i7: Four heat pipes and a copper base ensure optimal cooling for AMD R9 and Intel U7 / i7.  Superconducting Heat Pipes: By incorporating advanced evaporator and condenser wick structures, enhance heat dissipation for thermal performance.  SickleFlow Edge 120 Fan: Experience premium airflow with cooling with our optimized PWM blade for stability.  Dynamic PWM Fan: A PWM 4-pin header allows adjustable fan speeds from 690 to 2,500 RPM, to balance noise and airflow.  Frosted Blade Design: The frosted blade enhances the dispersion of ARGB lighting, creating a vibrant and customizable luminous effect.  Simplified Brackets: Redesigned brackets simplify installation on AM5 and LGA 1851/1700 platforms.

productName: Corsair MAKR PRO 75 Hall Effect DIY keyboard &#150 customizability and elite performance. - Pre-Installed CORSAIR MGX Hyperdrive switches - Ultimate typing experience - Full aluminum build - Balanced FR4 switch plate - 75% form factor - High-performance, low-latency - Powerful addon modules - FlashTap Technology Enabled - Customizable in lightweight CORSAIR Web Hub
copy1: The CORSAIR MAKR PRO 75 Hall Effect DIY Keyboard&#146s an exciting blend of personalization and performance. Featuring a full aluminum build with elegantly machined curves, this 75% form factor keyboard stands out with superior style, upgradability, and aesthetics. Get pro-level performance with dual actuation support, Rapid Trigger technology, and FlashTap SOCD handling. Choose pre-installed adjustable CORSAIR MGX Hyperdrive switches or swap in supported magnetic keyswitches to enhance them with 8,000Hz hyper-polling via AXON in wired mode. Enjoy the ultimate typing experience with gasket mounting for amazing feel, an FR4 switch plate, and 8-layer sound dampening for amazing acoustics.

Slim and attractive design to ensure physical compatibility with all 8 th Generation or newer Intel Core i7, and AMD Ryzen 4000 Series notebooks. productName: CORSAIR VENGEANCE DDR5 SODIMM 16GB (2x8GB)  DDR5-4800 (PC5-38400) C40 1.1V
productDescription: 16GB (2 x 8GB) DDR5-4800 PC5-38400 CL40 Dual Channel Laptop Memory Kit CMSX16GX5M2A4800C40 - Black
marketingCopy: Upgrade your DDR5 gaming or performance laptop with cutting-edge CORSAIR VENGEANCE SERIES DDR5 SODIMM memory modules. Compatible with a wide range of Intel laptops and small-form-factor PCs, VENGEANCE SODIMM upgrades your existing memory, harnessing the faster frequencies and greater capacities of DDR5. Modules automatically set to maximum system speeds for faster load times and smoother multitasking, and installation is quick and easy - just a screwdriver is needed for most laptops. VENGEANCE SODIMM is compatible with Intel XMP 3.0 on high-frequency kits for exceptional performance. Each module is rigorously screened, thoroughly tested, and backed by a lifetime limited warranty to ensure high performance and reliability, granting your laptop an instant boost.

productName: CORSAIR MP600 MINI PCIe 4.0 x4 NVMe M.2  SSD " M.2 2230 " Up to 7,000MB/sec read "  High-Density TLC NAND " Great for Steam  Deck and Microsoft Surface
productDescription: MP600 MINI 2TB 3D TLC NAND PCIe Gen 4 x4 NVMe M.2 Internal SSD
marketingCopy: The CORSAIR MP600 MINI PCIe 4.0 x4 NVMe M.2 SSD provides great storage performance in a tiny package. The ultracompact M.2 2230 form factor is ideal for handhelds like the Valve Steam Deck, ASUS ROG Ally, and MSI Claw A1M. Offering sequential read speeds of up to 7,000MB/sec and sequential write speeds of up to 6,200MB/sec, files open faster, games load quicker, and devices boot sooner. High-density TLC NAND flash memory offers an ideal mix of performance and endurance.

productDescription: VENGEANCE 16GB (2 x 8GB) DDR5-5200 PC5-41600 CL40 Dual Channel Desktop Memory Kit CMK16GX5M2B5200Z40 - Gray
marketingCopy: CORSAIR VENGEANCE DDR5 optimized for AMD motherboards delivers the higher frequencies and greater capacities of DDR5 technology in a high-quality, compact module that suits your system. Tightly-screened high-frequency memory chips power your PC through faster processing, rendering, and buffering than ever, with onboard voltage regulation providing reliable power for easy, finely controlled overclocking. CORSAIR iCUE software enables real-time frequency monitoring, and onboard voltage regulation. A distinctive solid aluminum heatspreader keeps your memory cool, while ensuring wide compatibility with a huge range of motherboards and CPU coolers. With a limited lifetime warranty as your guarantee of reliability for years to come, VENGEANCE DDR5 for AMD continues a long-standing legacy of memory performance.

marketingCopy: CORSAIR VENGEANCE RGB DDR5 memory for AMD delivers DDR5 performance, higher frequencies, and greater capacities optimized for AMD motherboards while lighting up your PC with dynamic, individually addressable ten-zone RGB lighting. Tightly screened high-frequency memory chips enable faster processing, rendering, and buffering than ever, with onboard voltage regulation providing reliable power at high frequencies for easy, finely controlled overclocking. Take control with CORSAIR iCUE software and enable RGB lighting customization, realtime frequency monitoring, and onboard voltage regulation. A custom PCB provides superb signal quality for high performance and stability on the latest DDR5 motherboards. For cutting-edge DDR5 performance with mesmerizing RGB lighting, VENGEANCE RGB DDR5 for AMD lights the way.

copy1: Introducing the new Patriot Core Series DDR5, the newest high-performance memory solution! With a plug-and-play functionality, the Core Series is able to be installed right out the box, making it an easy setup with no hassle. To ensure longevity and reduce overheating, the Core Series has a low voltage of 1.1v. Additionally, its crafted with the Patriot Blue Core Heatshield for that extra bit of heat protection! With a high speed of 5600MT/s, the Patriot Core offers faster data rates and better bandwidth than previous DDR4 modules; whether you are editing videos, playing games, or multitasking using several applications, the Patriot Core Series DDR5 ensures that lagging is a problem of the past. To ensure the best compatibility for users, the Core Series has been tested across the latest Intel and DDR5 platforms. Whenever youre ready to upgrade your system, the Patriot Core Series DDR5 is ready to deliver!

The case supports two 120 mm fans or a single 240 mm AIO cooler, plus ATX power supplies up to 270 mm long. It also includ
productDescription: Sliger CX3152i ATX 3U Server Chassis - Black
marketingCopy: The Sliger CX3152i Obsidian Black is a rugged 15 inch deep 3U rackmount chassis built from steel. It is engineered to support a broad range of motherboards including ATX, Micro ATX, SSI CEB, and eATX up to 10.5 inch deep. It provides space for up to five full height PCIe cards with GPUs up to 115 mm tall while accommodating full length GPUs up to 324 mm depending on cooling. The case supports two 120 mm fans or a single 240 mm AIO cooler, plus ATX power supplies up to 270 mm long. It also includes a 5.25 inch bay, three 2.5 inch SSD mounts, and front IO ports including USB C 10 Gbps and two USB A. With its robust build quality, compact rackable footprint, and flexible storage options, it is a strong choice for workstation or server environments.
copy1: The Sliger CX3152i Obsidian Black is a rugged 15 inch deep 3U rackmount chassis built from steel. It is engineered to support a broad range of motherboards including ATX, Micro ATX, SSI CEB, and eATX up to 10.5 inch deep. It provides space for up to five full height PCIe cards with GPUs up to 115 mm tall while accommodating full length GPUs up to 324 mm depending on cooling. The case supports two 120 mm fans or a single 240 mm AIO cooler, plus ATX power supplies up to 270 mm long. It also includes a 5.25 inch bay, three 2.5 inch SSD mounts, and front IO ports including USB C 10 Gbps and two USB A. With its robust build quality, compact rackable footprint, and flexible storage options, it is a strong choice for workstation or server environments.

copy1: The Playdate is a bright, ultra-portable handheld gaming system designed to bring creativity and fun back to gaming. Its bold yellow design, crisp 1-bit black-and-white display, and unique mechanical crank introduce an entirely new way to play. Marketing Copy:The Easy One Touch 6 Dash & Windshield Mount is a universal phone holder engineered for your safety and convenience. The Easy One Touch system makes it possible to mount or retrieve your phone in seconds with a quick: one-handed motion. Simply squeeze the release bars to open the mount cradle: then press your phone against the Easy One Touch trigger button. The self-centering arms will close automatically. The enhanced stabilizing cradle maintains a fixed position so your phone stays locked in place: even on rough roads: and gives you access to your phones USB port at all times. The Easy One Touch 6 quickly and securely installs on both dashboards and windshields via a super strong suction cup base. The new streamlined telescopic arm effortlessly extends from 5â€�- 6.75â€� by simply pulling or pushing the inner arm. Keep your charging cable neatly stowed away when not in use thanks to the built-in cord management system: which rotates and flexes to hold cables of any size or shape. The adjustable bottom foot makes it easy to accommodate larger phone and case combinations: while the rotating ball joint helps you find the perfect viewing angle. With a sleeker design and superior quality: the Easy One Touch 6 is sure to complement any modern automotive interior while delivering the best in smartphone mounting solutions.

With the Easy One Touch system, you can mount or remove your phone in seconds using one hand, just squeeze the release bars and press your phone against the trigger button to lock it in place. productName: Amazing Axolotl Thinking Putty
marketingCopy: Ready to have a whole lotl fun? Amazing Axolotl Thinking Putty is a shimmering pink putty inspired by everyone's favorite adorable amphibian. Whether you need help focusing or need a play break, this putty will help you swim through your day with ease!
copy1: Amazing Axolotl is a shimmering pink putty inspired by everyone's favorite adorable amphibian.

productName: Egg-Cellent Thinking Putty
marketingCopy: It's double the fidget fun with Egg-Cellent Thinking Putty. This unique putty comes with a globby ball that you can play with on its own or stretch and squish with your putty. Crack open the fun and enjoy an “egg-cellent” fidget experience like no other!
copy1: This unique putty comes with a yellow globby yolk ball that you can play with on its own or stretch and squish with your egg white putty.

productName: Sponge Putty Thinking Putty
marketingCopy: Get ready to make a splash in your fidget routine! Inspired by the playful texture of the sea sponge, this unique bubbly Thinking Putty is as soothing as it is entertaining. Sponge Putty is perfect for squishing, stretching, and creating your own undersea adventure- no snorkels required!
copy1: Inspired by the playful texture of the sea sponge, this unique bubbly Thinking Putty is as soothing as it is entertaining.

productName: Blooming Botanicals Thinking Putty
marketingCopy: Blooming Botanicals Thinking Putty is unlike anything you've ever seen! Bring this putty into the sunlight and watch the flowers bloom with color. The soft flower charms absorb the sunlight and instantly change from white to pink, blue, or purple.  Take it out of the light and they fade back to white so you can play over and over!
copy1: Bring this putty into sunlight and watch the flowers bloom with color! The soft flower charms absorb the sunlight and instantly change colors.

productName: Mix Your Own Fruity Smoothy Thinking Putty
productDescription: Mix Your Own Fruity Smoothy Thinking Putty
marketingCopy: Mix your own Fruity Smoothy Thinking Putty! Everything you need is included in the tin. Simply mix the color-izer with the clear putty, add your mix-in, then play!
copy1: Mix your own Thinking Putty with super fun fruit elements!

productName: Unicorn Dream Slime Charmers
marketingCopy: Squishy, stretchy, satisfying fun! Crazy Aaron’s Slime Charmers include uniquely themed slimes with delightful scents and exceptional textures. Allow these DIY-inspired slimes to charm you! Each slime includes themed charms and textured mixers for you to add in. Immerse yourself in the mesmerizing play of slime - swirl, pull, squeeze, and fold. Which Slime Charmers will you pick?
copy1: Delightfully scented slippery and gooey pink slime with rainbows, unicorns and other enchanting items.

productName: Dino Dew Slime Charmers
marketingCopy: Experience Jurassic sized fun with Crazy Aaron's Slime Charmers Dino Dew. This bright green slime and dinosaur themed charms and beads will have your create a world a million years in the making. Banana scented to heighten your senses.  Mix, stretch and create with these dinosaur themed charms. So create your own world when dinosaurs ruled with Slime Charmers Dino Dew!
copy1: Delightfully scented clear slippery and gooey bright green slime with unique dinosaur charms.

productName: I Scream You Scream Slime Charmers
productDescription: I Scream You Scream Slime Charmers
marketingCopy: The “coolest” experience yet with the new Crazy Aaron’s Slime Charmers I Scream, You Scream!  This silky smooth, buttery pink slime is filled with charms that represent the best treats on the planet, ICE CREAM!  Pick your favorites or go with the works as you satisfy your frozen cravings.  So don’t skip on the toppings and go big with Slime Charmers I Scream, You Scream!
copy1: Delightfully scented buttery silky smooth slime with ice cream treat charms.

productName: Lollipop Shop Slime Charmers
marketingCopy: You deserve something sweet today and you’ll find in the new Crazy Aaron’s Slime Charmers Lollipop Shop. This fluffy blue slime will keep you wanting to come back for more.  With the sweetest charms on earth to mix and match into this soft, fluffy slime you will create your own candy shop experience.  The slime will expand and stretch as you play, mix, and create.  So be creative and satisfy your sweet tooth with Slime Charmers Lollipop Shop.
copy1: Delightfully scented soft and puffy slime with candy charms.

productName: Zoolandia Slime Charmers
copy1: Delightfully scented clear sparkling blue slime with various animal charms.

productName: Mixed By Me Scentsory Putty Mash-Ups Kit
productDescription: Mixed By Me SCENTsory Putty Mash-Ups Kit
marketingCopy: Make four of your very own Crazy Aaron’s SCENTsory Putty Mash-Ups! The possibilities are endless with the six varieties of scented putty. Mix different scents together to make one crazy combo! Design a label with the included markers and name your creation! Crazy Aaron's MIXED BY ME Collection puts the power of creation in the palm of your hands! This SCENTsory Mash-Up Kit comes with 6 Scentsory putty packets that you can mash-up to create unique scents!
copy1: Scented DIY putty kit with 6 scented putty packets, markers and tins to make your own scented putty creations.

notes: PLEASE NOTE THIS ITEMS SHIPS IN A PDQ WHICH CONTAINS A 60 QTY ASSOTMENT OF MINI TINS.
productName: Lost Treasure Guardians Mini Putty Tins in PDQ
copy1: Collectible mini tins of unique putty including various guardian charms with their own persona.

productName: Cookie Cutter Thinking Putty
marketingCopy: Crave the sweetness of Cookie Cutter Thinking Putty  This amazing putty with green and red glitter will keep the holidays rolling.  Comes with two cookie cutters for that little bit extra for the holdays!
copy1: Enjoy this beautiful snow sparkly putty which includes 2 holiday cookie cutter shapes for endless holiday fun.

productName: Thinking Putty Winter Wonderland Advent Calendar
productDescription: Thinking Putty Winter Wonderland Advent Calendar
marketingCopy: Cozy up and be merry with Crazy Aaron's Holiday Collection! You'll find all the festive fidgets including themed Thinking Putty, Slime Charmers,  Land of Dough products, and even the Crazy Aaron's Advent Calendar! 24 days of Thinking Putty surprises await you with this Crazy Aaron’s Winter Wonderland Advent Calendar. You'll create a brand new holiday putty every three days as you uncover mystery Thinking Putty, bags of fun mix-in pieces, and even surprise holiday charms to complete your putties!
copy1: Wonderfully illustrated winter wonderland scene with a wide variety of putty styles that will bring joy throughout the holiday season.

productDescription: 6 in. CAT 6 UTP High Performance Snagless Ethernet Cables 5 Pack - Black
marketingCopy: Inland High Performance Internet Patch Cable is Cat6 UTP (with cross inside) rated; The Ethernet cord with 26 AWG bare copper wire provides universal connectivity for LAN network components such as PCs, computer servers, printers, routers, switch boxes, network media players, NAS, VoIP phones, PoE devices, and more. Cat6 performance at a Cat5e price but with higher bandwidth; Future-proof your network for 10 Gigabit Ethernet (backwards compatible with any existing Cat 5 cable network); Meets or exceeds Category 6 performance in compliance with the TIA/EIA 568-C.2 standard. A Category 6 Ethernet patch cable is also referred to as a Cat6 network cable, Cat6 cable, Cat6 Ethernet cable, or Cat 6 data/LAN cable. A wired Cat 6 data cable is more reliable and secure than a wireless network or Cat5 cable network for your internet connections.

marketingCopy: Inland High Performance Internet Patch Cable is Cat6 UTP (with cross inside) rated; The Ethernet cord with 26 AWG bare copper wire provides universal connectivity for LAN network components such as PCs, computer servers, printers, routers, switch boxes, network media players, NAS, VoIP phones, PoE devices, and more. Cat6 performance at a Cat5e price but with higher bandwidth; Future-proof your network for 10 Gigabit Ethernet (backwards compatible with any existing Cat 5 cable network); Meets or exceeds Category 6 performance in compliance with the TIA/EIA 568-C.2 standard. A Category 6 Ethernet patch cable is also referred to as a Cat6 network cable, Cat6 cable, Cat6 Ethernet cable, or Cat 6 data/LAN cable. A wired Cat 6 data cable is more reliable and secure than a wireless network or Cat5 cable network for your internet connections.

copy1: The der8enchtable is a professional open test bench developed with der8auer and ElmorLabs, built around an integrated PCB base that centralizes power delivery, storage, and connectivity to simplify hardware testing. It includes three fan zones with switchable speeds, a dedicated pump zone for AIOs, support for SSDs, USB, and microSD boot media, and multiple USB ports for peripherals. Its modular aluminum frame allows radiator and PSU mounting or can be removed to run the PCB alone for a compact setup, and it supports both air and liquid cooling along with addressable RGB lighting.

What's in the Box:Launchkey 49; USB A to C Cable
Features:In-depth DAW Control; Tweak your Software; Perform with a high-quality keybed; Play drums and instruments; Powerful tools for creating chords and patterns; Always stay in key; Split and layer the keyboard; Connect to other instruments; Create your own control surfaces; NKS-ready software
Meta Description:Launchkey 49 is a powerful DAW controller with a suite of onboard creation tools. Every element has been designed to feel musical: expressive: and razor focused on creative flow; from the semi-weighted keybed and 16 pads with polyphonic aftertouch: to the carefully laid out control surface with in-depth DAW integration. Play instruments and drums: launch clips and scenes: and get instant hands-on control of your DAWâ€™s mixer: devices: and effects. Launchkey also has a unique: editable Arpeggiator: three Chord Modes to quickly create musical progressions: a Scale Mode that keep you in the right key: and a Chord Detector that shows what chord is currently being played on the OLED display.

productName: Montech LightFlow 360 Black ARGB AIO Liquid CPU Cooler, Infinity Mirror Pump, 20 FPI Radiator, 27mm Thickness, Pre-Installed Fans, 6-Year Warranty
copy1: Montech LightFlow unleashes peak performance with a supreme water-cooling solution designed to balance power and style. This all-in-one liquid CPU cooler combines high-efficiency thermal performance with premium aesthetics, making it an ideal choice for gamers, creators, and PC enthusiasts who demand reliable cooling and a striking visual presence.  At the heart of the design is a water pump with an infinity mirror effect, delivering a bold, futuristic centerpiece that instantly elevates any PC build. Immersive RGB lighting creates a sense of endless depth, while LightFlow ARGB technology enhances reflections and visual layering, seamlessly merging high-performance cooling with refined, modern aesthetics.  Engineered for efficient heat dissipation, the radiator features a single-fin structure with 20 FPI (fins per inch), optimized to maintain consistent thermal performance under heavy workloads. With a 27 mm radiator thickness (approximately 1.06 inches), it achieves an ideal balance between airflow efficiency and cooling capability, ensuring stable temperatures even for high-TDP processors.  Installation is fast and user-friendly thanks to pre-installed fans, reducing build time and simplifying assembly. Whether upgrading an existing system or building a new one, the design delivers a smooth and hassle-free setup experience.  For long-term confidence, the cooler is backed by an extended six-year warranty, providing peace of mind beyond standard coverage. Compensation applies not only to the product itself, but also to component damage caused by leakage due to product defects (please refer to official warranty terms for full details), reflecting Montech&#146s strong commitment to quality and reliability.  The product is available in both 240 mm and 360 mm configurations. The 240 mm package dimensions (L &#215 W &#215 H) measure 306.1 &#215 232 &#215 146.5 mm (approximately 12.05 &#215 9.13 &#215 5.77 inches), while the 360 mm package dimensions measure 448 &#215 210 &#215 137 mm (approximately 17.64 &#215 8.27 &#215 5.39 inches).

productName: Fanttik Slim V10 Mix Cordless Car Vacuum, 4 in 1 Handheld Air Duster
copy1: 4-in-1 Multifunctional Car Vacuum  The Fanttik Slim V10 Mix Cordless Vacuum is a versatile tool designed for cleaning cars, homes, offices, and outdoor spaces. It includes a range of attachments that make it easy to reach and clean tight spots like car seats, crevices, and vents. It&#226&#128&#153s also perfect for dusting computer keyboards, consoles, and other devices. Beyond just cleaning, this vacuum can also evacuate storage bags, quickly inflate yoga balls, air mattresses, and swim rings. Make your cleaning and inflation tasks more efficient with this all-in-one tool  Smart LED Display  This wireless car vacuum cleaner is equipped with a user-friendly LED display. With just a 1-second press, you can easily turn the device on or off. When you start it up, the display provides real-time updates on the battery level and suction mode. This feature offers a smart and interactive experience, keeping you informed and in control throughout your cleaning tasks  Powerful Suction and   Long-Lasting   Performance  This handheld vacuum features an advanced brushless motor that provides a maximum power of 100W, delivering impressive suction strength of up to 16000Pa/40AW. Unlike traditional brushed motors, its innovative design ensures enhanced durability and quieter operation while offering twice the suction power. The vacuum includes both high and low-speed modes, providing 13 minutes of runtime on high and up to 35 minutes on low. This flexibility makes it easy to handle a range of cleaning tasks  Lightweight and Portable  Weighing just 515g, this mini handheld vacuum cleaner is both compact and easy to handle. Its ergonomic grip is designed for comfort, even during long cleaning sessions.  User-Friendly Design  It comes with a handy storage bag for effortless portability, making it perfect for keeping in SUVs, MPVs, and EVs. Whether you're camping, traveling, or on a business trip, this vacuum is your convenient cleaning solution  One-Click Dust Emptying   and Washable Filter  This vacuum is designed with one-click dust emptying button, making it simple to dispose of dust without getting your hands dirty. The transparent dust container lets you see when it needs to be emptied. The efficient HEPA filter captures 99.99% of dust and is easy to remove and wash. A cleaning brush is included to keep the vacuum operating and service life at its best

productName: Fanttik X10 Portable Tire Inflator
marketingCopy: Our air pump series has always maintained high-level functionality. The X10 APEX Tire Inflator not only is it a long-lasting tire inflator, but it also doubles as a compact power station. With its sleek design, it makes an excellent gift for friends who love camping, road trips, or outdoor adventures.
copy1: Fanttik X10 Portable Tire Inflator is an ultra-lightweight, pocket-sized digital air compressor weighing only 1.2 pounds (544g), designed for easy one-hand operation and convenient storage in pockets, bicycle racks, cars, or backpacks. Despite its compact size, it delivers up to 150 PSI with a high-performance chip, inflating a 10/70 R17 tire from 28 to 35 PSI in just 38 seconds. It can continuously inflate up to 7 motorcycle tires (110/70 R17) on a full charge, taking approximately 2.5 minutes per tire. Suitable for cars, motorcycles, bicycles, balls, swim rings, and other inflatables. The large LED screen displays 4 preset inflation modes and a manual mode, allowing precise pressure setting with automatic shut-off to prevent over-inflation. The digital gauge shows current and target pressures with &#194&#1771.5 PSI accuracy. Equipped with an 18-inch heat-resistant hose and multiple adapters, it fits most valve types. USB-C fast charging and USB-A output enable quick inflation and device charging. Compact and cordless, Fanttik X10 is your smart tire care solution for everyday and emergency use.  Ultra-Lightweight & Portable: Weighing only 1.2 pounds (544g), the Fanttik X10 is compact and easy to hold with one hand. Its small size fits perfectly in pockets, backpacks, or car compartments for convenient storage and quick access anytime.  Fast & Powerful Inflation: Powered by a high-performance chip, this inflator delivers up to 150 PSI. It can inflate a 10/70 R17 tire from 28 to 35 PSI in just 38 seconds, providing quick and efficient inflation when you need it most.  Multiple Preset Modes & Auto Shut-Off: Features 4 preset inflation modes for different tire types and a manual mode to set custom pressure. The inflator automatically stops once the target pressure is reached, ensuring accurate and safe inflation every time.  Versatile & User-Friendly Design: Comes with an 18-inch heat-resistant hose and multiple adapters to fit most valve types. Supports USB-C fast charging and includes a USB-A output port to charge your devices on the go, making it perfect for outdoor and emergency use.

copy1: The Thermalright Peerless Assassin 140 SE is a high-performance dual-tower air cooler designed for exceptional heat dissipation, quiet acoustics, and long-term reliability. The heatsink features a robust fin stack measuring 140 &#195&#151 132 &#195&#151 158 mm (5.51 &#195&#151 5.20 &#195&#151 6.22 inches) and is built with six 6 mm heat pipes made from C1100 pure copper with nickel plating for rapid and efficient heat transfer. Cooling performance is driven by two premium fans: the TL-C12C-X28 V2 120 mm fan sized 120 &#195&#151 120 &#195&#151 28 mm (4.72 &#195&#151 4.72 &#195&#151 1.10 inches), delivering speeds up to 1850 RPM, 88.89 CFM airflow, and 2.21 mmH&#226&#130&#130O static pressure for strong intake; and the TL-D14CB 140 mm fan, measuring 140 &#195&#151 140 &#195&#151 27 mm (5.51 &#195&#151 5.51 &#195&#151 1.06 inches), pushing up to 77.8 CFM with 2.09 mmH&#226&#130&#130O pressure at only 25.6 dBA for efficient exhaust. Both fans utilize S-FDB bearings and 4-pin PWM control, providing smooth, quiet, and durable operation. With its powerful dual-tower architecture, high-performance fans, and broad compatibility, the Peerless Assassin 140 SE is an outstanding cooler for modern multi-core CPUs and performance-focused PC builds.

copy1: The Thermalright Peerless Assassin 140 SE ARGB is a premium dual-tower CPU air cooler engineered for powerful heat dissipation, vibrant lighting effects, and quiet, reliable performance. Its optimized heatsink measures 140 &#195&#151 132 &#195&#151 158 mm (5.51 &#195&#151 5.20 &#195&#151 6.22 inches) and utilizes six 6 mm C1100 pure copper heat pipes with nickel plating, delivering rapid and efficient heat transfer for modern high-core CPUs. The cooler is equipped with two high-performance ARGB fans: the TL-C12C-X28-S V2 120 mm fan, sized 120 &#195&#151 120 &#195&#151 28 mm (4.72 &#195&#151 4.72 &#195&#151 1.10 inches), running up to 1850 RPM with 88.89 CFM airflow and 2.21 mmH&#226&#130&#130O static pressure; and the TL-D14CB-S 140 mm fan, measuring 140 &#195&#151 140 &#195&#151 27 mm (5.51 &#195&#151 5.51 &#195&#151 1.06 inches), delivering 77.8 CFM and 2.09 mmH&#226&#130&#130O at only 25.6 dBA. Both fans feature S-FDB bearings, 4-pin PWM control, and 5V 3-pin ARGB connectors, enabling smooth operation, long lifespan, and fully customizable lighting synchronization with motherboard software. Combining strong cooling power, low noise, and stunning ARGB illumination, the Peerless Assassin 140 SE ARGB is an ideal solution for performance-driven and visually immersive PC builds.

copy1: The Kingcool CRYO TITAN ARGB Black CPU Air Cooler delivers efficient and reliable cooling performance with a powerful dual-tower design engineered for high-TDP processors. Featuring six copper heat pipes and a nickel-plated copper base, it rapidly transfers heat away from the CPU to maintain low temperatures even under heavy gaming or content-creation workloads. The dual heatsink towers maximize surface area for improved thermal dissipation, while two 120mm PWM ARGB fans provide strong airflow of up to 59.63 CFM at a controlled noise level, operating at 1800 RPM &#194&#17710%. The addressable RGB lighting syncs seamlessly with compatible motherboards via a 5V 3-pin ARGB connector, allowing customizable lighting effects. With compact dimensions of 125 &#195&#151 125 &#195&#151 154 mm (4.92 &#195&#151 4.92 &#195&#151 6.06 inches), the cooler offers excellent DRAM and case compatibility and supports a wide range of platforms including Intel LGA 1851 / 1700 / 1200 / 115X and AMD AM4 / AM5. Fully painted from the outer frame to the fin stack, the CRYO TITAN not only delivers a premium black aesthetic but also provides enhanced protection against oxidation, ensuring long-lasting cooling performance and durability.

productName: Linsoul Kiwi Ears Astral 1DD+6BA Hybrid in Ear Monitor, Wired Earbuds, HiFi Studio Recording &Mixing Earphone, Portable Gaming IEMs for Professional Music Engineers Audiophiles (Blue)
copy1: The Astral is Kiwi Ear&#226&#128&#153s professional-grade in-ear monitor, engineered for music professionals and discerning audiophiles alike  This custom-designed in-house 10mm bioceramic diaphragm dynamic driver offers an excellent low-end thump, smoothly transitioning into lush bass  Complementing the dynamic driver, the Astral incorporates two dual midrange balanced armature drivers alongside a dual ultra-high frequency tweeter  Featuring a powerful 9dB sub-bass shelf, it transitions gracefully into the low-midrange, with a cutoff at 300Hz that allows for a natural bass roll-off.

productName: Linsoul Kiwi Ears Belle 10mm DLC Dynamic Driver in-Ear Monitor, HiFi Wired Earbuds with Dual Silver-Plated Cables, Professional IEM for Stage Performance/Gaming/Music Production (with MIC, Black)
copy1: The Belle is designed to deliver a lively yet accurate sound that suits every scenario&#226&#128&#148from casual music enjoyment and daily commuting to gaming and professional monitoring. Its precise tuning ensures an engaging and energetic presentation without sacrificing tonal balance.  The Belle features powerful bass and warm mids, complemented by a carefully tuned 3kHz pinna peak for clarity and bite. This balance allows vocals and instruments to sound natural and expressive, while the treble maintains excellent detail without harshness.  Powered by Kiwi Ears&#226&#128&#153 latest DLC diaphragm, the Belle achieves remarkable rigidity and responsiveness. With less than 0.1% THD and a linear phase response, it delivers exceptional accuracy, speed, and cohesion&#226&#128&#148ideal for both studio use and analytical listening.  Offered in both USB-C and 3.5mm versions, the Belle includes a premium two-core silver-plated copper cable that minimizes signal loss and enhances high-frequency clarity. Its durable, detachable design ensures longevity and versatile compatibility with your favorite devices.

productName: Apos x Community Gremlin Tube Amp Headphone Tube Amplifier,Class A Balanced Tube Amp,Replaceable Tubes 12au7,6922/XLR,4.4mm Balanced Interface.Amp for HiFi Desktop Speakers,Loved by Audio Enthusiasts
copy1: Class A and fully-balanced at an unheard of price  The Gremlin tube headphone amp is a little monster with a ferocious bite. With 1250mW of output power, it has the muscle to drive most headphones that cross its path. It may be ugly, naked, and small, but don't judge a beast by its cover. For just $120, you're getting a Class A, fully-balanced tube amp with matched tubes&#226&#128&#148something unheard of at this price. It delivers sound that&#226&#128&#153s sumptuous and lush, with musical tonality and heart-melting mids. Once it gets its claws in you, you won't want it to let go.  Feeding the beast: Tubes   transistors  The Gremlin is a hybrid headphone amp that combines the precision of transistors with the warmth of vacuum tubes. While solid-state amps (which rely solely on transistors) deliver accuracy, they lack the soul of tubes. In the Gremlin, the vacuum tubes in the pre-amp stage flood your music with rich harmonics and a warmth that solid-state amps can&#226&#128&#153t touch.  Always hungry: the Gremlin's Class A appetite  The Gremlin is a predator that never rests. With a Class A design, it's always on the hunt, keeping the current flowing without pause. Other amps flip their transistors on and off to save energy and keep cool&#226&#128&#148efficient, sure, but prone to distortion that muddles the sound. Not this beast. Its relentless operation means every note is delivered with the raw purity and ferocious detail that only Class A amplification can provide.  A poised predator: a fully-balanced amplifier  With a fully-balanced design from input to output, the Gremlin cancels out the kind of hums, buzzes, and interference that can creep in with unbalanced systems. This means you get a cleaner sound&#226&#128&#148especially important if you're using sensitive headphones or high-end equipment that picks up every little detail. The Gremlin gives you the best of both worlds: the warm, rich tones of tube amplification with the minimal interference of balanced design.

productName: Apos x Geshelli Merlin AKM Desktop DAC - AK4493 DAC chip with 32-bit, 768kHz PCM support - Native DSD512 playback via USB - TI OPA1652 op amps - TI DIX9211 SPDIF decoder for clean coaxial input - Amanero 768 USB interface with driverless Type-C connection - Coaxial SPDIF input supports up to 192kHz/24-bit - RCA and XLR outputs
copy1: Not all wizards wear robes  Wielding an AK4493 DAC chip, a TI OPA1652 analog output stage, and an Amanero USB module that banishes jitter to the nether realms, the Merlin DAC is here to weave magic from your ones and zeroes.   Conjured for the Gremlin. Ready for anything.    When we launched the Gremlin tube amp, a few sharp-eared listeners told us it paired beautifully with Geshelli DACs. We tried one for ourselves and wholeheartedly agreed. So we reached out to our friends at Geshelli Labs and began work on what would become the Merlin: the ideal digital wizard companion for the Gremlin&#226&#128&#153s analog mischief. But this DAC isn&#226&#128&#153t a one-spell wizard. With balanced XLR and single-ended RCA outs, it&#226&#128&#153s ready to weave magic into just about any system.  Amanero 768 USB Module  The USB input is handled by an Amanero 768 module&#226&#128&#148one of the most stable, reliable USB interfaces on the market. It supports PCM up to 768kHz/32-bit and native DSD512, with galvanic isolation to reduce system noise. With driver-free operation, it connects via USB Type-C and draws no power from your source, giving you better compatibility and zero ground loop issues.    Sonic magic with the AK4493   Musical, full-bodied, and crystal clear, the AK4493 D/A chip supports 32-bit files and sampling rates up to 768kHz through USB. Its dynamic range (120dB) and THD N (0.00038%) performance offer noise-free resolution.   Texas Instruments analog stage  The output stage is driven by a TI OPA1652 op amp. This low-noise, low-distortion chip has a clean, neutral tonality that preserves the depth and resolution of the AK4493.    SPDIF decoding done right   The TI DIX9211 chip handles coaxial SPDIF input with support for 24-bit/192kHz PCM. It's a robust, low-jitter decoder that integrates well with consoles, CD players, streamers&#226&#128&#148anything that runs coaxial out&#226&#128&#148to keep timing errors low and digital edges clean.   Stack the party    Add the Stacker to your order if you plan on using the Merlin DAC with the Gremlin amp. This translucent acrylic platform lets you stack the two together like a proper adventuring party. It's precision-cut to cradle the Gremlin's lower acrylic plate and keep it snugly perched without adhesive or screws. Our very own Sean Flynn designed the stacker, and our buddies at Salad made it a reality. We&#226&#128&#153ve priced it to be a no-profit product&#226&#128&#148the price you pay simply covers our costs. But we&#226&#128&#153d like to keep the DIY community ethos going, so we&#226&#128&#153re working with Salad to make it an open-source download on GitHub. Print it, tweak it, remix. If you come up with something great, send it our way at communityfeedback@apos.audio so we can show it off.   Product highlights  AK4493 DAC chip with 32-bit, 768kHz PCM support  Native DSD512 playback via USB  TI OPA1652 op amps  TI DIX9211 SPDIF decoder for clean coaxial input  Amanero 768 USB interface with driverless Type-C connection  Coaxial SPDIF input supports up to 192kHz/24-bit  RCA and XLR outputs  Specs DAC chip: AKM AK4493  Op amps: XLR: 2x TI OPA1652   RCA: 1x TIOPA1652 SPDIF decoder: TI DIX9211  USB interface: Amanero 768 with USB Type-C  SNR: 120dB  THD N: 0.00038%  PCM support:  USB: up to 768kHz/32-bit  SPDIF: up to 192kHz/24-bit  DSD support: Native DSD512 (USB)  Inputs: USB Type-C, Coaxial SPDIF Outputs: RCA, XLR  Power: 12V DC  Weight: 6.4 oz  Dimensions: 5" W x 3.25" D x 2.25" H  What&#226&#128&#153s included Apos x Geshelli Merlin DAC  Manual  Power cable

productName: Apos x Community Rock Lobster IEMs Earbud/Earphones &#150 Tuned for Rock, Guitar-Forward Sound, Detachable 2-Pin Cable
copy1: THE LEGEND OF THE LOBSTER   The history of rock is full of legendary frontpeople: from Freddie Mercury, who could command a stadium with his voice, to Ozzy Osbourne, who could level a hotel room under the influence of whatever he was on at the time. Henry Rollins, Jimi Hendrix, Karen O: artists who embody freedom, fearlessness, and a really good time. These were our inspirations for the Rock Lobster.   We set out to create an IEM you could take anywhere, plug into virtually anything, and count on to hold its own in any corner of the rock genre. Something you&#226&#128&#153d always want with you, whether you&#226&#128&#153re connecting it to a phone, a portable player, or a desktop DAC/amp. We wanted an IEM that could do justice to the rumbling power of a John Bonham drum fill without drowning out the delicate croon of Robert Plant. One that could shimmer like the chimes at the start of a Cure song without wearing you down with sibilance. A pan-genre, everyday-carry IEM for lovers of rock music.   Where Is My Mid?   When most people think &#226&#128&#156rock headphone,&#226&#128&#157 they think big, pounding bass and sparkly treble, but the unsung hero of a great rock IEM is the mids. You need enough separation to pick apart the guitars, singers, backup singers, synths, and everything else crashing together in the mix. The Rock Lobster delivers just that: natural mids with clarity and space, and deep-digging bass and sparkling treble.   Baby Driver   With a low impedance of 32&#206&#169, the Rock Lobster is easy to drive. Plug it into your phone, iPod, or laptop and you&#226&#128&#153re good to go. But don&#226&#128&#153t mistake &#226&#128&#156easy&#226&#128&#157 for &#226&#128&#156basic.&#226&#128&#157 Give it the proper gear and it really comes alive. We&#226&#128&#153ve been loving it on everything from a trusty old 5th gen iPod to a FiiO DAP to the Gremlin/Merlin stack&#226&#128&#148and it scales beautifully with all of them.   K.I.S.S. (Keep it silicone, stupid) ear tips   We went through dozens of ear tips to find the right ones, testing everything from silicone to memory foam. Some muddied the mids, some choked the bass, some did unspeakable horrors to the treble. In the end, we landed on a simple pair of silicone tips that brings a satisfying and enveloping low-end kick without smothering the separation in the mids. Sometimes simpler is better.   Walk the line: A Cable that doesn&#226&#128&#153t go overboard   Tuning a rock IEM is tricky, and the cable is a big part of that equation. Some rock, like punk and garage, actually suffers from too much clarity and detail: all those imperfections get laid bare like when the houselights come up during the middle of a set. On the other hand, a bad cable just muddies everything, which kills the separation and texture you need for bands like TOOL or Radiohead. After testing everything from bargain bin wires to boutique cables that cost more than the IEMs themselves, we landed on a cable that strikes the right balance: enough clarity to reveal the details, but not so pristine that it robs the Ramones of their gritty charm. It&#226&#128&#153s available in both 3.5mm and 4.4mm.   I&#226&#128&#153ve Just Seen a Faceplate   Like the best frontpeople, the Rock Lobster knows how to strike a balance: understated when it needs to be, electric when the spotlight hits. The black &#226&#128&#156lobster tail&#226&#128&#157 faceplate is cool and muted, easy to wear on the subway or in the office without attracting attention. But when you pop them out of your ears, that&#226&#128&#153s when the spotlight hits, and they become bold, fiery, and impossible to ignore.  Specs  Connector: 3.5mm wired  Driver: 10mm liquid crystal polymer (LCP) dynamic driver  Impedance: 32&#206&#169  Sensitivity: 105dB  Socket: 0.78mm 2-pin  Frequency response: 20Hz &#226&#128&#147 20kHz   What&#226&#128&#153s included Rock Lobster IEMs  Detachable 3.5mm cable  Assorted ear tips  Manual

copy1: Our PC38X has quite the pedigree. With tens of thousands of units soldand a nearly 5-star average reviewit started as a project with the audiophile icon Sennheiser. Then, it launched as a collab with EPOS (Sennhesier's recently sold gaming division). Now, it's all Dropwith the same design and manufacturing that have made it such a hit, year after year. Powered by high-fidelity drivers found on Sennheiser's venerable GSP 500 and 600 headsets, the PC38X delivers vivid sonic details with an ultra-wide frequency response. It can also be driven more easily than its predecessor, the PC37X, courtesy of a reduced 28-ohm driver impedance. On the exterior, a plush headband with breathable mesh-knit pads and a split design keeps you cooler and better supported for long sessions. Both knit mesh and classic velour earpads are included, so you can choose your preferred fit. Finally, for improved compatibility, the PC38X comes with two cables: one 3.5-millimeter TRRS cable for mobile devices and consoles (no adapter required), and a split cable for PCs.

productName: Fender AudioBox Go
copy1: The Fender AudioBox Go is a portable, high-performance 2 x 2 USB-C audio interface designed for creators who need professional-quality recording anywhere. Its XLR mic/line combo input with switchable  48V phantom power handles vocal and instrument recording with clarity, while the dedicated TS instrument input delivers plug-and-play tone for guitars, basses, and line-level sources. Professional 24-bit / 96 kHz converters and low-noise preamps ensure every recording is crisp and detailed. The &#194&#188-inch stereo headphone output and balanced TRS main outputs give you flexible monitoring options, while the Mix control lets you dial in low-latency, real-time tracking for precise performance. Bus-powered and ultra-portable, the AudioBox Go integrates seamlessly into home studios, desktop setups, or mobile rigs.
